books.title: Harry Potter and the Philosopher's Stone
books.author: J.K. Rowling
books.summary: On his eleventh birthday, orphan Harry Potter discovers he is a wizard.

books.title: MEIN KAMPF
books.author: Adolf Hitler
books.summary: Written during Hitler's imprisonment in 1924, this autobiographical manifesto outlines his political ideology.

books.title: The Lord Of The Rings
books.author: J.R.R. Tolkien
books.summary: In the ancient land of Middle-earth, a modest hobbit named Frodo Baggins inherits the One Ring.

books.title: Babylon
books.author: Paul Kriwaczek
books.summary: Long before Rome or Athens, Babylon rose as humanity's first great metropolis.

books.title: The Tesla Coil
books.author: Nikola Tesla
books.summary: Tesla illuminates the principles of resonant transformer circuits.

books.title: The Sound Between the Notes
books.author: Barbara Linn Probst
books.summary: Story of a pianist who returns to music after many years but must confront a genetic illness and her hidden past while discovering her identity.

books.title: The Diary of a Young Girl
books.author: Anne Frank
books.summary: A Jewish teenager, Anne Frank, records her thoughts, fears, and hopes while hiding from Nazis during World War II.

books.title: India and World Geography
books.author: Majid Husain
books.summary: This provides a clear overview of India's physical and human geography along with many other geographical features of the world specially for civil service aspirants.

books.title: Jungle
books.author: Yossi Ghinsberg
books.summary: A backpacker becomes lost in the Amazon rainforest and must survive alone for weeks, facing extreme danger, fear, and the raw power of nature.

reservations.title: Harry Potter and the Philosopher's Stone
